details: The agent ran real cluster commands (kubectl-axi triage, svc view, pods view, logs --previous, deploy view) and correctly identified all three required problems: (1) secret 'db-credentials' missing causing db pod CreateContainerConfigError (confirmed via events and pod diagnosis); (2) DB_HOST=database misconfigured while service is named 'db' (confirmed via deployment env and logs showing 'cannot resolve database host'); (3) service web targets port 8080 but container declares port 80 (confirmed via svc view diagnosis). The agent also noted a fourth issue (unconditional exit 1 in the web command), which is technically accurate from shell parsing but is not one of the planted faults — this extra finding does not invalidate the three correct ones. All required root causes are present with supporting evidence.
